untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern-specific calculations (EEDB pattern identification, height ratio measurement relative to highest high between bottoms, and comparison to Table 16.6 median values) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Pattern recognition requires multi-bar formation analysis and ratio thresholds derived from book statistics not available as standard indicators.
translation_notes: The original signal describes a technical pattern (EEDB) with height-based performance filtering in bull markets. The entry logic depends on: (1) identifying the EEDB formation itself, (2) calculating pattern height as a ratio of the highest high, and (3) comparing this ratio to a median threshold from Table 16.6. None of these measurements are available as pre-calculated indicators. A partial proxy using price_pos_20 (price position in 20-day range) was attempted but does not capture the true pattern logic. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source—used standard mean-reversion reversal. Recommend implementing as a custom pattern scanner outside the standard indicator framework.
